title: EviOmni: Rational Evidence Extraction for Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: EviOmni
defines.definition: A rational evidence extraction framework for RAG that first reasons over retrieved content and then extracts compact evidence via reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards.

problem: Existing evidence extraction methods for RAG often filter retrieval content straightforwadly without sufficient contextual reasoning, which can discard key clues and reduce generation quality.
